consent.label: I consent to participate in this study
consent.description: I understand that my data will be processed anonymously and I can withdraw at any time.

presort.title: About you
presort.description: Please answer a few questions before starting the sort.

header.title: Does this statement represent your point of view?
header.subtitle: Swipe left to disagree, right to agree, or down for neutral.
header.hint: Your choices here are not final. This step simply helps organize your thoughts before the precise sorting.

complete.title: Rough sort complete
complete.subtitle: You have categorized all statements. Now we will refine your choices.

deck.title: Statements to sort
deck.confirm_reset: Are you sure you want to reset the grid? All placed cards will return to their piles.

toolbar.mobile: Sort from <0>disagree</0> (left) to <1>agree</1> (right). Tap to place within the grid.
toolbar.desktop: Sort from <0>disagree</0> (left) to <1>agree</1> (right). Drag cards to the grid.

tips.extremes: It's often easier to start by placing the cards you feel most strongly about in the extreme columns (-4 and +4).
tips.vertical: Note: Vertical position is irrelevant. Only the left-to-right order matters.

post.title: Final questions
post.description: You're almost done! Please take a moment to explain your choices for the most significant statements.

extreme.why: Why did you place this here?

missing.label: Is there any key statement missing to reflect your view?
missing.description: If so, please describe it briefly below.

general.label: General comments
general.description: Any feedback on the study or additional thoughts?

post.validation_error: Please complete all required comments (min 10 characters).

success.title: Thank You!
success.message: Your responses have been successfully submitted.
